title: Activity Register — Flow (from → choke-point → effects)
description: AR-REPORT-02 from → choke-point → effects over ClickHouse analytics.events: origin → operation → per-target requests + bytes. Byte aggregation filters effect_kind='egress' AND source='be' so only authoritative egress bytes are counted (AR-FE-03); fe_rum approximate rows are excluded. A Grafana groupBy row-grouping transform renders the origin → operation drill shape. DEFERRED: a literal Sankey / node-graph visual flow is intentionally NOT shipped — it needs a community panel plugin (a GF_INSTALL_PLUGINS addition + container recreate, a real Wave-0 cost). The table + row-grouping transform fully satisfies AR-REPORT-02; the Sankey is a noted future enhancement (research Open Question 1), not a silent scope reduction.

list.name: origin
list.label: Origin
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT origin FROM events WHERE origin != '' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY origin

targets.rawSql: SELECT origin, operation, target AS dependency, sum(requests) AS requests, sum(bytes_out + bytes_in) AS bytes FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND effect_kind = 'egress' AND source = 'be' AND $__conditionalAll(origin IN (${origin:singlequote}), $origin) GROUP BY origin, operation, target ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 200
